mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.avatar, u.nickname, a.id AS articleId, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.views, a.likes, a.collects FROM t_article a INNER JOIN t_user u ON a.user_id = u.id
INNER JOIN t_article_tag atg ON a.id = atg.article_id AND atg.tag_id = #{tagId}
WHERE a.is_published = 1 AND a.audit_status = 1 AND u.status = 1
ORDER BY a.sort DESC, a.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_article ( id, user_id, title, summary, cover, content, is_published, audit_status, sort, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{content}, #{isPublished}, #{auditStatus}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO t_article_tag ( id, article_id, tag_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.articleId}, #{item.tagId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_article SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover = #{cover}, content = #{content}, is_published = #{isPublished}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS article_id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.cover, a.user_id, t.id AS tag_id, t.name AS tag_name FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN t_article_tag atg ON a.id = atg.article_id LEFT JOIN t_tag t ON atg.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.id = #{articleId}
